laptop.head: 671a101
laptop.note: toolchain scripts exist, uncommitted smoke/verify/toolbox added

phone1_vm.smoke: 14/15 PASS (1 FAIL unknown, verify JSON malformed)

phone2_vm.note: may be stuck at OpenRC hardware driver scan

corrected_false_positives.corrected: 14/15 PASS — not complete, verify JSON broken, eval bug in smoke script
Futex hang observed but ADR not written, relay wrapper broken, no clean-HOME matrix completed
Phone2 image unknown provenance, golden never transferred, SSH unconfirmed
FALSE_POSITIVE — no TEST_ROOT fixture ever ran
PROVISIONAL — Phone2 absent, Phone1 VM OpenCode blocked, tunnel was down
PROVISIONAL — not a controlled 30-min soak, used accumulated hours

critical_blocks: CRITICAL: Phone1 VM relay wrapper ~/bin/opencode is 0 bytes — inference broken
CRITICAL: Phone2 QEMU launcher not runit-supervised — dies on terminal close
CRITICAL: Phone2 image 415MB vs golden 647MB — different images, unknown provenance
CRITICAL: -nographic multiplexes monitor+console — caused (qemu) prompt hang
CRITICAL: Smoke test uses eval "$@" — unsafe quoting
CRITICAL: Verifier output has duplicate opening braces — JSON malformed
CRITICAL: Phone2 VM identity duplication risk — hostname/machine-id/SSH keys not sanitized

queue.title: Observe currently running Phone2 QEMU PID 32134
queue.description: Do not start another QEMU. Inspect PID, start time, command, image, port 22222 listener, console log, stdout/stderr, memory/CPU use. Poll every 15s.

queue.title: Repair toolbox verifier + resolve Phone1 14/15 smoke
queue.description: Capture full verifier+smoke output (no head pipe). Validate JSON with jq -e. Refactor smoke: remove eval, use dedicated predicates, output one valid JSON doc, human logs to stderr. Distinguish guest-only from laptop-only. Require PASS=15/15 or explicit SKIP with reason.

queue.title: Architecture-aware Alpine guest package manifests
queue.description: Create config/alpine-guest/packages-required.txt and packages-optional.txt. Required: bash, ca-certificates, curl, jq, git, openssh, rsync, tmux, python3, py3-pip, file, util-linux, coreutils, findutils, iproute2, iputils, bind-tools, procps, strace, lsof, socat, netcat-openbsd, tcpdump, logrotate, tzdata. Optional: build-base, gdb, htop, vim, nano. Create profile-phone-vm.json and profile-laptop.json.

queue.title: Complete Phone1 VM toolbox from manifests
queue.description: Deploy repaired scripts+manifests. Run installer --check, installer --apply, verifier, smoke. Verify persistent after controlled reboot. Require 15/15.

queue.title: Phone1 OpenCode diagnostic matrix (no pipeline masking)
queue.description: Quarantine ~/bin/opencode (0 bytes). Use absolute binary. Test 9 scenarios: A)existing HOME, B)fresh HOME no config no cache, C)existing with cache renamed, D)plugins disabled, E)empty OPENCODE_CONFIG_DIR, F)binary from repo root, G)binary from empty dir, H)TTY vs non-TTY, I)QEMU CPU/memory baseline. Use pipefail. Save stdout/stderr/process list/logs/strace for each. Classify: REPRODUCIBLE_STARTUP_HANG / CONFIG_STATE_FAILURE / CACHE_FAILURE / PLUGIN_FAILURE / QEMU_RUNTIME_INCOMPATIBILITY / MUSL_RUNTIME_INCOMPATIBILITY / UNKNOWN. Write ADR after 2 clean-HOME reproductions.

queue.title: Quarantine and audit Phone2 QEMU image
queue.description: After safe QEMU stop: preserve as uom-phone.prequality-UTC.qcow2, record SHA-256, qemu-info --output=json, qemu-img check (capture real exit code), inspect console history, compare virtual/cluster/backing, compare against Phone1 golden SHA. Classify: PARTIAL_COPY / OLD_CLONE / INDEPENDENT_INSTALL / CORRUPT / UNKNOWN.

queue.title: Decide Phone2 image (retain or replace)
queue.description: If healthy independent: retain+configure. If healthy clone: sanitize before integration. If bad/unknown: archive and replace from offline Phone1 golden via qemu-img convert (never stream-copy live).

queue.title: Convert Phone2 QEMU to foreground runit-supervised service
queue.description: Replace bash launcher with runit exec (no &). Use -display none + -monitor unix:socket + -serial file. Create device.env with UOM_VM_CPUS=2, UOM_VM_MEMORY_MB=1536 (start conservative). Include finish script with 15s delay. Make every script read UOM_VM_SSH_PORT. Verify single QEMU PID, stable start time, console progress, SSH.

queue.title: Sanitize Phone2 guest identity
queue.description: Reset hostname to uom-phone2-qemu, regenerate machine-id, regenerate SSH host keys, set UOM device ID to phone2-vm, clear inbox/outbox/leases/logs/stale PIDs, remove cached endpoints. Update known_hosts after key rotation. Verify root login disabled, password auth disabled, doas correct.

queue.title: Install and verify toolbox inside Phone2 VM
queue.description: Deploy same manifests+scripts. Run check/apply/verify/smoke then reboot. Require valid JSON, all applicable checks pass, persistent state, stable QEMU PID, SSH after reboot.

queue.title: Test OpenCode independently inside Phone2 VM
queue.description: Install OpenCode officially. Run same diagnostic matrix as R4. Do NOT assume Phone2=Phone1 (different kernel/QEMU/memory/image). Classify: LOCAL_VM_WORKING / REPRODUCIBLE_STARTUP_HANG / PROXY_REQUIRED / UNKNOWN. Compare binary SHA+runtime against Phone1. If both fail clean-HOME: evaluate glibc aarch64 guest via ADR.

queue.title: Mirror shared UOM tooling (source/config only)
queue.description: Create versioned shared guest profile. Synchronize via Git bundles: source scripts, package manifests, config templates, tests, widget templates, endpoint schemas. Never sync binaries, /usr, machine-id, SSH keys, auth, logs, leases. Verify HEADs match after manifest-verified bundle round trip.

queue.title: API wrapper + model rotation verification
queue.description: Test api_wrapper.py, model-rotate.sh, opencode-zen-free, opencode-zen-smart, NETWORK_CODE_POLICY.md using offline fixtures. Test: 429 with Retry-After, 503 retry, timeout, cooldown persistence, free-model fallback, all free models unavailable, paid provider accidentally configured. Only verified zero-cost models. Sequential fallback + circuit breakers. No rotation to evade quotas.

queue.title: Host/guest network responsibility refactor
queue.description: Termux hosts: Wi-Fi changes, endpoint discovery, reverse tunnels, wake locks, physical network watchdog. Guests: SSH, task execution, local diagnostics, reading host-generated endpoint registry. Do NOT scan /24 from QEMU. Create shared endpoint registry schema. Pin identities with stable HostKeyAlias. Reuse existing uom-port-guardian.sh, uom-ip-discover.sh, etc.

queue.title: Profile-aware widgets on both phones
queue.description: Audit both phones for 6 widgets: 00-UOM-Status, 20-UOM-Guest-Shell, 30-UOM-Zen-Console, 40-UOM-Host-Console, 50-UOM-Logs, 90-UOM-Stop. Generate from ~/.config/uom/device.env. Phone2 Guest-Shell must use port 22222. Verify existence, executable bit, syntax, behavior. Interactive widgets not marked failed for remaining open.

queue.title: Bootstrap validation under isolated TEST_ROOT profiles
queue.description: Run real isolated tests for phone1-vm, phone2-vm, phone-relay-only profiles. Verify: apply twice, correct SVDIR, uom-sv helper, QEMU foreground service, device.env, boot script, widgets, toolbox manifests, no-network behavior, no Termux:Boot behavior, existing-config backup, no secrets, no push.

queue.title: Manifest-verified Git bundle sync
queue.description: Create bundle manifest with device ID, repo ID, source branch, base/head commit, destination, SHA-256, timestamp. Verify manifest+checksum+git bundle verify. Fetch into namespaced refs. Fast-forward only. Install and test deny-all pre-push hook in every active repo. No real push.

queue.title: Final dual-QEMU topology gates
queue.description: Test: Laptop only, L+P1, L+P2, L+both, P1+P2 without laptop (if possible), both VMs headless, one VM unavailable, network transition, model cooldown, interrupted bundle transfer. Do not classify proxy-to-laptop as independent local OpenCode.

queue.title: Fresh controlled 60-minute soak
queue.description: Start only after all gates pass. Probe every minute: both QEMU PIDs+start times, runit service states, VM SSH, CPU/memory/swap, disk, console errors, tunnel states, queue/lease state, package verifier state, Git refs, model cooldowns, widget status, no duplicate QEMU, no restart storm. Require 60 consecutive minutes with zero unexplained failures. Record in JSONL.

queue.title: Commit intended source changes + truthful report
queue.description: Stage source/config/docs/tests only. Never stage runtime state, auth, bundles, images, logs. Run git diff --check, syntax tests, fixture tests, secret scan, direct pre-push hook test. Write reports/UOM-DUAL-QEMU-QUALITY-20260720.md with truthful modes and remaining limits. git commit only. NO git push.

hard_rules: NO git push, git send-pack, gh pr create, or remote writes
NO paid models — only opencode/big-pickle, north-mini-code-free, deepseek-v4-flash-free
Bounded SSH timeouts on every remote call (minimum timeout 30)
PID + start-time verified before any process signal
NO git reset --hard or git clean -fd on work in progress
NO StrictHostKeyChecking=no — use accept-new + stable known_hosts
NO clone or transfer a live QCOW2 image
NO mark gate PASS without captured command output + exit code
NO run physical-network scanning from inside QEMU guests
NO sync binaries between x86_64/aarch64/musl/Bionic environments
NO mirror Phone1 OpenCode problems blindly to Phone2
NO overwrite Phone2 image until provenance understood
NO commit runtime state, QCOW2 files, credentials, logs, auth data
Keep deny-all pre-push hook active in every repository

progress_policy.before_long_operation: Print TIME TO WAIT: approximately <range> for <operation>, MAXIMUM WAIT: <deadline>, SUCCESS CONDITION: <observable evidence>
progress_policy.during_wait: Print heartbeat every 15-30s: WAITING: operation=<name> elapsed=<seconds> observation=<last state>
